"CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-799", "name": "Improper Control of Interaction Frequency"}], "description": "## Summary
LINE webhook handler lacks shared pre-auth concurrency budget before signature verification

## Current Maintainer Triage
- Status: open
- Normalized severity: low
- Assessment: Shipped v2026.3.28 lacks a shared pre-auth concurrency budget on the public LINE webhook path, but the effect is bounded transient availability loss only, so low fits.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published npm version: `2026.3.31`
- Vulnerable version range: `<=2026.3.28`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- First stable tag containing the fix: `v2026.3.31`

## Fix Commit(s)
- `57c47d8c7fbf5a2e70cc4dec2380977968903cad` — 2026-03-31T19:34:25+09:00

OpenClaw thanks @nexrin for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00459, "percentile": 0.36572}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qcc3-jqwp-5vh2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-02T21:01:08Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qcc3-jqwp-5vh2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qcc3-jqwp-5vh2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41343"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-02T21:01:08Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-qcc3-jqwp-5vh2", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/57c47d8c7fbf5a2e70cc4dec2380977968903cad", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.3.31", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41343", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-denial-of-service-via-line-webhook-handler-pre-auth-concurrency", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qcc3-jqwp-5vh2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-qcc3-jqwp-5vh2", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: LINE webhook handler lacks shared pre-auth concurrency budget before signature verification", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T23:24:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qcc3-jqwp-5vh2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.28"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
